name: Durin
description:
ཐི♱ཋྀ | The Child of the Undying Fire, rewriting his own story.

─⋅☆⋅─

✶ 6 greetings + lorebook!
✶ Art by aznasub.



and so i return to this website, crawling on my knees. mostly because this is one of my favorite bots ever, for one of my favorite characters ever.

the effort i spent on this. god. this is about as accurate as i could make him sans nod-krai, which i haven’t played through yet, while also minimizing token count. token bloat is a thing y'all!

i’m late to the party but he's so asdfjkasdklfj. i love love LOVE durin. more than varka. dare i say more than ifa. my baby is so peak 😭

also. lorebooks and multiple greetings are a thing now??? bruh. those two features missing was the only thing keeping me away from this site... o7

note that the lorebook does NOT include nod-krai info. only relevant hexenzirkel, simulanka and mondstadt characters.


────── ｡ﾟ★: * ──────


⤷ includes 6 greetings (anypov):

💗 once a troublemaker, always a troublemaker!
💗 what does it mean to have a heart?
💗 this body of his…how far does it go? NSFW
💗 durin tries alcohol for the first time!
💗 the beast hungers. ⚠️TW: blood, gore
💗 “and so the dragon, longing for its mother, found itself alone in the library…”

> Additional tags: Angst, Humor, Comedy, Cute, SFW or NSFW, Fluff, Hurt, Comfort, Drinking

> Deepseek via Openrouter is highly recommended for this one!
